title: Addis Cutlery Drainer (One Size) (Metallic)
features: With drainage holes for quick drying.
Free standing or can be slotted on to draining rack.
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life. Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. Part Of The Sink side Range This aesthetic and sturdy utensils holder is part of the Addis sink side range and is made out of totally BPA free plastic. 4 Compartments This holder has 4 compartments which is perfect for cutlery separation making it easier for when you come to store it away. Easy To Clean This utensils holder is really easy to clean just simply swill, wipe and reuse.
